docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CISNEROS, JONATHAN A. AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, DOLCE ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA AMERICAN ENTERPRISE OF SAN FRANCISCO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
